name: project-tracker-sync
description: Bidirectional task sync with Linear and Jira. Status mapping, comment sync, and conflict resolution.
author: SoftBacon Software

configSchema.label: API Key
configSchema.description: Linear API key or Jira API token

configSchema.label: Jira Domain
configSchema.description: Your Jira domain (e.g. myteam.atlassian.net). Only for Jira.

configSchema.label: Jira Email
configSchema.description: Email for Jira API auth. Only for Jira.

configSchema.label: Default Mycelium Project
configSchema.description: Mycelium project ID for inbound items

configSchema.label: External Project ID
configSchema.description: Linear team ID or Jira project key
